name: Rinse 'N' Repeat

movements.notes: calories; add 2 calories each round for 6 rounds, then max calories for rounds 7-8

description: Eight rounds of a short swim and ski-erg calories, the calorie target climbing each round before capping out.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2022/8 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; every 2 minutes for up to 8 rounds
